ddls:
CREATE TABLE "publications" (
  "publication_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each publication */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the publication */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of publication (e.g., journal, conference, workshop, book) */,
  "ranking" INTEGER /* Ranking of the publication */,
  "publisher_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the publisher of the publication */,
  "h_index" INTEGER /* h-index of the publication */,
  "impact_score" REAL /* Impact score of the publication */,
  "publication_date" TEXT /* Date of publication */,
  "volume" TEXT /* Volume number of the publication */,
  "issue" TEXT /* Issue number of the publication */,
  "pages" TEXT /* Page range of the publication */,
  "doi" TEXT /* Digital Object Identifier (DOI) of the publication */,
  "citation_count" INTEGER /* Number of citations the publication has received */,
  "abstract" TEXT /* Abstract of the publication */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("publication_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_publications_publisher_id FOREIGN KEY ("publisher_id") REFERENCES publishers ("publisher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "publishers" (
  "publisher_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each publisher */,
  "publisher_name" TEXT /* Name of the publisher */,
  "publisher_email" TEXT /* Email address of the publisher */,
  "website" TEXT /* URL of the publisher's website */,
  "contact_person" TEXT /* Name of the primary contact person at the publisher */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the primary contact person at the publisher */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the publisher */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("publisher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "authors" (
  "author_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each author */,
  "author_name" TEXT /* Full name of the author */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the author */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the author belongs to */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the author */,
  "research_interests" TEXT /* Research interests of the author */,
  "orcid" TEXT /* ORCID identifier of the author */,
  "affiliation" TEXT /* Institution or department the author is affiliated with */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("author_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "publication_authors" (
  "publication_id" INTEGER /* ID of the publication */,
  "author_id" INTEGER /* ID of the author */,
  "author_order" INTEGER /* Order of the author in the publication */,
  "corresponding_author" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the author is the corresponding author */,
  "affiliation" TEXT /* Institution or department the author was affiliated with at the time of publication */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("publication_id", "author_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "keywords" (
  "keyword_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each keyword */,
  "keyword_name" TEXT /* Name of the keyword */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description or definition of the keyword */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("keyword_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "publication_keywords" (
  "publication_id" INTEGER /* ID of the publication */,
  "keyword_id" INTEGER /* ID of the keyword */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("publication_id", "keyword_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, author) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "publication_id" INTEGER /* ID of the publication being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the publication */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the publication was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the publication */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used to access the publication */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_publication_id FOREIGN KEY ("publication_id") REFERENCES publications ("publication_id")
)
column_names: Type of publication (e.g., journal, conference, workshop, book)
Reference to the publisher of the publication
Digital Object Identifier (DOI) of the publication
Number of citations the publication has received
Name of the primary contact person at the publisher

Boolean indicating if the author is the corresponding author
Institution or department the author was affiliated with at the time of publication
Description or definition of the keyword
Role of the user (e.g., admin, author)
Date and time of the user's last login
Date and time when the user account was created

ID of the publication being accessed
ID of the user accessing the publication
Date when the publication was accessed
IP address of the user accessing the publication
User agent string of the device used to access the publication
